title: TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview

detail.title: TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 released at eapcet.tgche.ac.in. Download TS EAMCET admit card for Agriculture, Pharmacy (from April 23) & Engineering (from April 27), check exam dates, timings and instructions.

content.text: The Telangana Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) and Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH) have released the TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 for the Agriculture & Pharmacy (A&P) stream, with Engineering stream hall tickets to be issued shortly. Candidates who have successfully registered for the Telangana State Engineering, Agriculture & Pharmacy Common Entrance Test (TG EAPCET, earlier TS EAMCET) can download their hall ticket from the official website, eapcet.tgche.ac.in.
TG EAPCET 2026 for the Agriculture & Pharmacy stream will be held on May 4 and 5, while the Engineering exam will be conducted from May 9 to 11, 2026.
Download TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026

rows: JNTU Hyderabad on behalf of TGCHE

sections.heading: TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

content.text: The direct link to download TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 is available on the official exam portal under the “Download Hall Ticket (TG EAPCET‑2026)” section. Candidates from both A&P and Engineering streams must use their registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number, and date of birth to access the admit card.
Education portals and news sites have also shared the official link and basic steps, but candidates are advised to always download from eapcet.tgche.ac.in for authenticity.

sections.heading: How to Download TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to download your TG EAPCET 2026 hall ticket:

items: Visit the official TG EAPCET website: Click Here
On the homepage, click on the “Download Hall Ticket (TG EAPCET‑2026)” link under the online applications section.
Select your stream (Agriculture & Pharmacy or Engineering), if prompted.
Enter your TG EAPCET 2026 registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number (Intermediate/Class 12), and date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format.
Click on the “Get Hall Ticket” or “Submit” button.
Your TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 will appear on the screen; verify all details carefully.
Download the hall ticket PDF and take at least 2-3 printouts on A4 white paper for exam day and future reference.

content.text: If any discrepancy is found in the hall ticket (name, photo, signature, or stream), candidates should immediately contact the TG EAPCET helpline or JNTUH exam authorities.

sections.heading: TG EAPCET 2026 Exam Dates and Timings

content.text: According to the official schedule, TG EAPCET 2026 will be conducted as follows:

items: Agriculture & Pharmacy (A&P) stream: May 4 and 5, 2026
Engineering (E) stream: May 9, 10 and 11, 2026

content.text: The exam will be held in multiple sessions per day in computer‑based mode at centres across Telangana. Shift‑wise reporting time, gate closing time and exam timing will be mentioned on the candidate’s hall ticket and must be followed strictly.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: The TG EAPCET hall ticket carries important candidate and exam details that must be checked thoroughly. Key details include:

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature
Registration number and hall ticket number
Stream: Agriculture & Pharmacy or Engineering
Exam date and shift timing (as allotted)
Test centre name, code and full address
Candidate’s category, gender and local area (if applicable)
Instructions regarding reporting time, permitted items and exam‑day rules

content.text: Any mismatch with the application form should be reported before the exam day.

sections.heading: Documents Required with TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: On the day of the TG EAPCET exam, candidates must carry the following to the test centre:

items: Printed copy of TG EAPCET Hall Ticket 2026 (colour or clear black & white)
A valid photo ID proof such as: Aadhaar Card Voter ID Driving Licence Passport Any other government‑issued ID as per guidelines
Aadhaar Card
Voter ID
Driving Licence
Passport
Any other government‑issued ID as per guidelines
Recent passport‑size photograph, if specified for affixing on attendance sheet or proforma

content.text: Candidates without a valid hall ticket and acceptable ID will not be allowed to enter the examination hall.
The hall ticket and official notifications mention crucial exam‑day instructions which candidates must follow:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time indicated on the hall ticket to avoid last‑minute rush.
Carry only required documents and permitted stationery; follow invigilator instructions strictly.
Do not carry prohibited items such as mobile phones, smart watches, calculators, Bluetooth devices, earphones or any electronic gadgets into the exam hall.
Biometric verification or photograph capture may be conducted at the centre; cooperate with staff during verification.
Keep the TG EAPCET hall ticket safe even after the exam, as it may be needed during counselling and admission.
